welcome.title: Welcome to XFCE Linux
welcome.description: XFCE Linux is an immutable XFCE desktop on freedesktop-sdk with daily bootc updates. Thanks for testing!

features.title: XFCE on Wayland
features.description: Ships XFCE4 running natively on Wayland via xfwl4, a custom Wayland compositor built for XFCE.

community.title: Getting Started
community.description: After installation, updates apply automatically. Use Flatpak for additional apps.

completed.title: Ready to Install
completed.description: Select a disk to install XFCE Linux. The process takes a few minutes.
